headline: Starbucks (SBUX) Valuation Check After AGM Governance Shift And Turnaround Update
summary: Starbucks (SBUX) is back in focus after its March 25 annual meeting, where shareholders backed all board nominees and approved a move from supermajority to simple majority voting. Management also reiterated confidence in ongoing turnaround efforts. See our latest analysis for Starbucks. Those AGM outcomes and management’s upbeat turnaround message come as the share price sits at US$90.43, with a 90 day share price return of 7.39% but a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 6.52%. This...

headline: Starbucks’ Bearista cup launch turned into a viral scramble
summary: The Bearista Cold Cup was meant to spread holiday cheer. Instead, it sold out in hours, sparked fights, and turned a $30 cup into a speculative asset.

headline: Starbucks Announces New Incentive Rewards Program to Create More Opportunities for Partners to Share in Success
summary: SEATTLE, April 02, 2026--Starbucks Coffee Company (Nasdaq: SBUX) today announced a new incentive rewards program designed to create more opportunities for hourly coffeehouse partners to share in the success of the Back to Starbucks transformation. The program reflects Starbucks continued commitment to offering one of the most competitive total compensation and benefits packages in the industry.

content.title: Starbucks Announces New Incentive Rewards Program to Create More Opportunities for Partners to Share in Success
content.summary: SEATTLE, April 02, 2026--Starbucks Coffee Company (Nasdaq: SBUX) today announced a new incentive rewards program designed to create more opportunities for hourly coffeehouse partners to share in the success of the Back to Starbucks transformation. The program reflects Starbucks continued commitment to offering one of the most competitive total compensation and benefits packages in the industry.

headline: Starbucks Dangles $1,200 Bonuses for Friendlier, Faster Baristas
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Starbucks Corp. wants to woo baristas to be friendlier and speedier, and it’s offering new payouts to make it happen.US hourly workers, which include baristas and shift supervisors, can now earn an additional $1,200 a year if their store meets targets for sales, operations and customer service, Starbucks said Thursday. The program kicks off in July, and the first quarterly payout will be paid in the fall.Starbucks is looking for a jolt after slow service and a focus on to-go order

content.title: Starbucks Dangles $1,200 Bonuses for Friendlier, Faster Baristas
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Starbucks Corp. wants to woo baristas to be friendlier and speedier, and it’s offering new payouts to make it happen.US hourly workers, which include baristas and shift supervisors, can now earn an additional $1,200 a year if their store meets targets for sales, operations and customer service, Starbucks said Thursday. The program kicks off in July, and the first quarterly payout will be paid in the fall.Starbucks is looking for a jolt after slow service and a focus on to-go order

headline: Starbucks Expands Tipping and Adds Bonuses to Boost Barista Pay
summary: Starbucks  is adding incentives for baristas to up their service and sales game—including by enlarging the tipping jar.  The coffee giant said Thursday that it will expand tipping for U.S. baristas when customers pay with credit or debit cards for mobile orders.  Tipping currently is restricted to customers placing in-store and drive-through orders with cash or credit cards, or mobile transactions using Starbucks cards.

content.title: Starbucks Expands Tipping and Adds Bonuses to Boost Barista Pay
content.summary: Starbucks  is adding incentives for baristas to up their service and sales game—including by enlarging the tipping jar.  The coffee giant said Thursday that it will expand tipping for U.S. baristas when customers pay with credit or debit cards for mobile orders.  Tipping currently is restricted to customers placing in-store and drive-through orders with cash or credit cards, or mobile transactions using Starbucks cards.

headline: Starbucks and Boyu Capital Finalize Joint Venture to Accelerate Long Term Growth in China
summary: SEATTLE, April 02, 2026--Starbucks Coffee Company (NASDAQ: SBUX) today announced the official closing of its previously announced joint venture with Boyu Capital, marking a significant milestone in the company’s long-term strategy to unlock sustainable, disciplined growth in China.

content.title: Starbucks and Boyu Capital Finalize Joint Venture to Accelerate Long Term Growth in China
content.summary: SEATTLE, April 02, 2026--Starbucks Coffee Company (NASDAQ: SBUX) today announced the official closing of its previously announced joint venture with Boyu Capital, marking a significant milestone in the company’s long-term strategy to unlock sustainable, disciplined growth in China.

headline: Starbucks brewing up new tipping, bonus incentives for workers
summary: Starbucks (SBUX) is expanding tipping and rolling out new bonus incentives for its baristas and franchise partners.Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma highlights the new campaign in Starbucks CEO Brian Niccol's turnaround plan for the coffee chain and the operational targets they are setting for workers.

content.title: Starbucks brewing up new tipping, bonus incentives for workers
content.description:
Starbucks (SBUX) is expanding tipping and rolling out new bonus incentives for its baristas and franchise partners.

Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma highlights the new campaign in Starbucks CEO Brian Niccol's turnaround plan for the coffee chain and the operational targets they are setting for workers.
content.summary: Starbucks (SBUX) is expanding tipping and rolling out new bonus incentives for its baristas and franchise partners.Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma highlights the new campaign in Starbucks CEO Brian Niccol's turnaround plan for the coffee chain and the operational targets they are setting for workers.
